docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $554.96 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE SEP-08-2009, FILED BY PETITIONER KLABACHA, BARBARA C

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER KLABACHA, BARBARA C RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LEGALMATCH.COM $14,615.00 PRINCIPAL, $554.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,169.96, TOGETHER WITH INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 7% FROM MAY-19-2009 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. SEE SCANNED DOC
